title: G7 Cyber Expert Group Statement on AI and Cybersecurity
body: "Recognising the rapid evolution of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies, including Generative AI (GenAI), agentic AI, and other advanced systems, the G7 CEG’s statement on AI encourages jurisdictions to monitor ongoing developments, promote public-private-academic collaboration, and proactively address the emerging and evolving cybersecurity risks AI may pose. "
